meaning: 贝卡[黎巴嫩中部一谷地]
examples: Just after Bhamdoun, the Bekaa Valley opens up before us.
Lebanon: Area between the Israeli border and the Litani River as well as the Bekaa Valley.
Lebanon: area between the Israeli border and the Litani River as well as the Bekaa Valley. All other Urban areas.
In Bekaa Valley, Mercy Corps has distributed hygiene kits, tablets to purify water, buckets and jerry cans to refugees.
Mercy Corps will be distributing over 6, 000 winter clothes and over 4, 000 vouchers for winter clothes in Bekaa this month.
